code_symbol_inventory_fetch_repositories.postgresqlSql: SELECT code_repository_id, root_path FROM inventory.code_repositories WHERE root_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY root_path
code_symbol_inventory_fetch_repositories.sqlServerSql: SELECT code_repository_id, root_path FROM inventory.code_repositories WHERE root_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY root_path

code_symbol_inventory_fetch_files_for_re.postgresqlSql: SELECT code_file_id, code_repository_id, relative_path, file_path, sha256, symbol_count, needs_semantic_backfill FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = %s ORDER BY relative_path
code_symbol_inventory_fetch_files_for_re.sqlServerSql: SELECT code_file_id, code_repository_id, relative_path, file_path, sha256, symbol_count, needs_semantic_backfill FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = ? ORDER BY relative_path

code_symbol_inventory_fetch_symbol_ids_f.postgresqlSql: SELECT code_symbol_id FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id = %s ORDER BY line_number, code_symbol_id
code_symbol_inventory_fetch_symbol_ids_f.sqlServerSql: SELECT code_symbol_id FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id = ? ORDER BY line_number, code_symbol_id

code_symbol_inventory_delete_file_symbol.postgresqlSql: DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_symbol_id = ANY(%s::uuid[]) RETURNING code_symbol_id
code_symbol_inventory_delete_file_symbol.sqlServerSql: DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_symbol_id IN (SELECT value FROM OPENJSON(?))

code_symbol_inventory_insert_symbols_bat.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS x(code_symbol_id uuid, code_file_id uuid, symbol_name text, qualified_name text, symbol_kind text, line_number integer, end_line_number integer, container_name text, metadata_json jsonb, symbol_hash text, signature text, visibility text, layer_code text, domain_code text, parent_symbol_id uuid, is_entry_point boolean, is_exported boolean, is_abstract boolean, enrichment_status text)) INSERT INTO inventory.code_symbols (code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name, qualified_name, symbol_kind, line_number, end_line_number, container_name, metadata_json, symbol_hash, signature, visibility, layer_code, domain_code, parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point, is_exported, is_abstract, enrichment_status) SELECT code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name, qualified_name, symbol_kind, line_number, end_line_number, container_name, metadata_json, symbol_hash, signature, visibility, layer_code, domain_code, parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point, is_exported, is_abstract, enrichment_status FROM rows RETURNING code_symbol_id
code_symbol_inventory_insert_symbols_bat.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @rows nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

code_symbol_inventory_update_file_metada.postgresqlSql: UPDATE inventory.code_files SET sha256 = %s, line_count = %s, symbol_count = %s, content_text = %s, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE code_file_id = %s RETURNING code_file_id
code_symbol_inventory_update_file_metada.sqlServerSql: UPDATE inventory.code_files SET sha256 = ?, line_count = ?, symbol_count = ?, content_text = ?, updated_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE code_file_id = ?
